name: textAnalysis
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.readingLevel === 'string'

input.text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. It was a sunny day.

_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/linguistics.js). Dispatch key 'linguistics.textAnalysis' via /api/lens/run; 3-arg handler(ctx, virtualArtifact, input) with input PEELED of one redundant {artifact:{data}} wrapper by lens-input-normalize.js. LinguisticsActionPanel sends callMacro('textAnalysis',{artifact:{data:{text}}}) → handler reads artifact.data.text||content; renders r.result.{wordCount,sentenceCount,vocabularySize,lexicalDiversity,readabilityGrade,readingLevel,avgWordLength,avgSentenceLength}. Deterministic pure compute (Flesch-Kincaid). FIXED (real defect): a poisoned non-string text threw 'text.split is not a function' (a 500, fail-OPEN); now String-coerced so poison degrades gracefully and every numeric output stays FINITE. Pinned by server/tests/linguistics-lens-macros.test.js.
